snapshot.title: Snapshot Viewer
snapshot.description: Check past rankings or manage data by selecting a specific date.

scoringSystem.title: Point System (v2.0)
scoringSystem.note: Each engagement is calculated individually. Bonus system has been removed.

legend.title: Community Classification
legend.subtitle: Weighting System
legend.description: Different weights are applied by community. Korean community receives additional bonuses based on follower count.
legend.note: Flag icons represent each user's primary activity language.

tooltip.text: Flags indicate the user's primary activity language

states.noDataDescription: There is no data to display. Try selecting a different period.

noTwitter.title: Please log in with your X account to participate in the leaderboard.

notRanked.description: Engage with NASUN's target tweets to enter the leaderboard!

toast.imageClipboardCopied: Image copied to clipboard! Paste with Ctrl+V on X.
toast.clipboardFailed: Clipboard copy failed. Please use the download image button.

topClimbers.description: Users with the most rank improvement
topClimbers.noClimbers: No rank improvements found in this period

intro.title: Join the Nasun community and earn exclusive rewards before launch!
intro.description: To participate, simply follow our official X account

rewards.topPercentageShare: Top Percentage Share of Total Pre-Allocated Launch Marketing Budget (TBA)
rewards.percentageShare: Percentage Share of the Total Pre-Allocated Launch Marketing Budget (TBA)
rewards.freeMint: 1 Free Mint of the Nasun Founders Membership NFT
rewards.discountedMint: 1 Discounted Mint of the Nasun Founders Membership NFT
rewards.allowlistAccess: Allowlist Access for 4 additional Founders Membership NFT mints / GTD
rewards.beyondRewards: Additional participation rewards and community perks will be announced soon.

engagementScoring.title: ENGAGEMENT SCORING
engagementScoring.description: Engage with Nasun's X account to accumulate points and climb the ranks of our leaderboard. All real and organic engagement with Nasun (follow, likes, replies, reposts, bookmarks) will win points but posting quality content like informative or creative posts

rulesGuidelines.title: ⚠️ RULES & GUIDELINES
rulesGuidelines.description: Following the rules and guidelines of X, any accounts involved in bot activity, spamming or inorganic manipulation of the rules to game the leaderboard will either be blacklisted or reset.
